text:
Destroy All Humans Nintendo Switch 2 launch trailer – cult-classic alien invasion arrives in full HD

Thanks to THQ Nordic, we have the launch trailer for Destroy All Humans on Nintendo Switch 2. The cult-classic alien invasion comes to the console with enhanced visuals, denser environments, improved shaders, and support for full HD up to 1440p resolution. Get more details in the following overview: Terrorize the people of 1950s Earth in the role of the evil...

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Top 200 best-selling N64 games in the U.S. revealed as Nintendo console celebrates 30th anniversary

The N64 turned 30 this week, and in celebration of the milestone, new data has been shared that reveals the top 200 best-selling games of all time on the classic Nintendo console. If you’re wondering what took the top spot, that goes to launch game Super Mario 64. The rest of the top five is GoldenEye 007, Mario Kart 64,...

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Lords of the Fallen 2 delayed, statement released

Lords of the Fallen 2, which was just recently announced for Nintendo Switch 2, has been delayed. The move applies to all platforms. Lords of the Fallen 2 is now launching in Q1 2027. Aside from improving the game on a quality level, moving the game back “also strategically positions Lords of the Fallen 2 outside of a highly competitive...

The post Lords of the Fallen 2 delayed, statement released appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Sonic Racing: CrossWorlds reveals free DLC Classic Sonic, Axel, Amigo plus new SEGA Music Collection [update: TMNT release date]

Original: Sonic Racing: CrossWorlds just announced its latest wave of DLC characters, led by Classic Sonic, Axel, and Amigo. Additionally, the SEGA Music Collection has been announced. Classic Sonic is available today. Axel, from Crazy Taxi, arrives in August. Amigo from Samba de Amigo follows in September. All of these characters are free on Nintendo Switch 2 and Switch. For...

The post Sonic Racing: CrossWorlds reveals free DLC Classic Sonic, Axel, Amigo plus new SEGA Music Collection [update: TMNT release date] appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Sonic Frontiers on Nintendo Switch 2 has quality and performance modes, Switch 1 save transfers, no upgrade path

We have a few more details about Sonic Frontiers: Definitive Edition, which was just announced and released for Nintendo Switch 2. First up, SEGA has confirmed the two different graphical modes are included. It’s possible to either go for performance or resolution. Performance means a higher frame rate, but the resolution will drop to compensate. SEGA didn’t go into specifics...

The post Sonic Frontiers on Nintendo Switch 2 has quality and performance modes, Switch 1 save transfers, no upgrade path appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Sonic Frontiers: Definitive Edition finally announced for Nintendo Switch 2, out now, trailer

After numerous leaks, Sonic Frontiers Definitive Edition has finally been announced for Nintendo Switch 2. Not only that, but you can purchase it now. We’ve heard about this one as early as March. Initially, the game was outed by a classification rating. More recently, the release date was leaked with a few details coming shortly after that. Sonic Frontiers: Definitive...

text:
Vampire Crawlers 1.5 update announced, patch notes – Endless Mode, Nintendo Switch 2 resolution boost, more

Poncle today unveiled a major update for Vampire Crawlers with version 1.5. Nintendo Switch 2 and Switch players will be able to access it soon. One of the main additions here is the inclusion of an Endless Mode, which can be accessed after completing the game. Another notable change is that the Nintendo Switch 2 version is receiving a resolution...

text:
Wanderstop launch trailer – narrative-driven tea shop management experience hits Nintendo Switch 2 and Switch

Wanderstop has appeared on both Nintendo Switch 2 and Switch, and in honor of that, we have the launch trailer. It offers another look at the narrative-driven tea shop management experience. Here’s an official overview with more details: Wanderstop is a narrative-centric cozy game about change and tea. Playing as a fallen fighter named Alta, you’ll manage a tea shop...

text:
Devil May Cry 5: Devil Hunter Edition Nintendo Switch 2 launch trailer

Capcom issued a launch trailer for Devil May Cry 5: Devil Hunter Edition. Starting today, the action game can be played on Nintendo Switch 2. author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Kynseed heading to Nintendo Switch, from Fable veterans

Kynseed, a life sim sandbox RPG made by PixelCount Studios, has now been confirmed for Nintendo Switch release. The game launches on August 4, 2026. Kynseed was developed by a team of veterans behind Fable. Players will raise a family, farm the land, run a business, and explore a world filled with NPCs. The Nintendo Switch version will include all...

The post Kynseed heading to Nintendo Switch, from Fable veterans appeared first on Nintendo Everything.
